reviews.comment:
Ubicación, muy buena de paso a chile.
Lugar bien puesto limpio en general, con baños normales aunque mejoraría la limpieza.
La atención del personal que carga combustible, regular/mala. Dejan colarse a personas del lugar, y te atienden lento casi a propósito. Parece que les gustara hacerse sentir importantes ni mirarte y no atenderte, quizás fue el turno el día o simplemente porque les puse mala cara por dejar pasar y atender a un auto del lugar que vió como maniobraba tratando de ingresar por el lugar correcto, quien además se quedaba hablando con ellos casi a propósito.
Recomendable, por supuesto que si, lugar de paso para aprovechar la parada, cargar combustible y quizás comprar algo como bebidas o galletas, al margen de usar los baños.
Las personas van y vienen, paciencia si les toca las mismas personas que me atendieron a mi.

(Translated by Google)
Location: Excellent, on the way to Chile.
The place is generally well-maintained and clean, with decent restrooms, although they could be cleaner.
The service from the fueling staff is mediocre to poor. They let locals cut in line and are slow to serve you, almost intentionally. It seems like they enjoy making themselves feel important, barely looking at you or serving you. Perhaps it was the shift that day, or simply because I gave them a hard time for letting a local car cut in and serving them. The local driver saw me maneuvering to enter through the correct lane, and he was also chatting with them, almost on purpose.

Recommended: Absolutely. It's a good place to stop, fill up, and maybe buy something like drinks or cookies, besides using the restrooms. People come and go, so be patient if you get the same staff who served me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SRFFtSlJSWE5PZEVSblNubHNSSFJSWTNwR1JYYxAB
